text.autoconfig.slipstream.title: Slipstream
text.autoconfig.slipstream.option.effect: How many blocks above the surface the ground effect activates. Boost and particles scale up quadratically as you get closer.
text.autoconfig.slipstream.option.accele: Speed added per tick at maximum ground proximity. Small numbers feel subtle; larger ones are noticeably snappy. Default: 0.001
text.autoconfig.slipstream.option.maxSpe: Hard speed ceiling for the ground effect boost, in blocks per tick. Vanilla elytra with a firework tops out around 1.5. Default: 3.0
text.autoconfig.slipstream.option.waterS: How many blocks above water spray particles appear. Independent of the boost height. Set lower than Effect Height for spray only when skimming close.
text.autoconfig.slipstream.option.liftSt: Upward force applied when descending near the surface. Counters gravity to keep you level when skimming. Fades out automatically when you pitch up to climb or dive.
